Object Perception Lab

Dr. Isabel Gauthier's research group at Vanderbilt University studying perceptual expertise, object recognition, and visual cognition.

Annual Review: Is domain-general object recognition ability a novel construct?

December 10, 2025

Conor and Isabel’s Annual Review, “Is domain-general object recognition ability a novel construct?” is now available in Annual Review of Psychology.

Object Perception Lab — Vanderbilt University

Located on native Cherokee, Choctaw, Chickasaw, Creek and Shawnee land
